INDIVIDUALS DATA: Data for each individual nestling on each day of data collection

column2: Unique brood identification number (YEAR+SITE+NEST NUMBER)
Year of nesting attempt
Block of nesting attempt
Day of year (where 1 = Jan 1) when first egg appeared in nest
Species (TRES = Tree Swallow, VGSW = Violet-green Swallow)
Assigned treatment (control, reduced, or enlarged)
Number of chicks present at the time
Location of nest box (SF, GR, NCA, or SCA)
Nesting box number
Number of times adult swallows visited the box in 1.5 hours
Feeding rate divided by brood size on the day provisioning video was taken
Whether the nestlings stayed in its natal box (natal) or was transferred to a foster nest (foster)
Unique individual ID (YEAR+SITE+NEST NUMBER+NESTLING NUMBER+ORIGIN)
Days since nestling was hatched (hatch day = 0)
Time of data collection (HHMM)
Precice nestling age, with time of measurements taken into account
Mass in grams
Time since capture when baseline blood sampling was completed
Baseline CORT (ng/ml)
Stressor-induced CORT (ng/ml)

INDIVIDUALS DATA: Data for entire broods for nestling day 15

column2: Unique brood identification number (YEAR+SITE+NEST NUMBER)
Year of nesting attempt
Block of nesting attempt
Species (TRES = Tree Swallow, VGSW = Violet-green Swallow)
Assigned treatment (control, reduced, or enlarged)
Day of year (where 1 = Jan 1) when first egg appeared in nest
Observed brood size averaged over each day of data collection
Location of nest box (SF, GR< NCA, or SCA)
Nesting box number
Whether the nest survived to nestling day 15 (survived) or failed (i.e., depredated/abandoned)
Average mass of nestlings on day 15
Average baseline CORT of nestlings on day 15 (ng/ml)
Average stressor-induced CORT of nestlings on day 15 (ng/ml)
Number of times adult swallows visited the box in 1.5 hours
Feeding rate divided by brood size on the day the video was taken
Time of day provisioning video was taken (HHMM)
Brood size on the day provisioning video was taken
Time of day data were collected for the brood
